Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5D00 "XOR-5D00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "XOR.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the LDA $C5, NOP instructions at $5DF8 to be JSR $1000 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $1000 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if a key is pressed and proceed to the start game screen. If not pressed, the routine performs the LDA $C5 and returns to continue the normal code flow.
